content: Engineering review found 5 critical gaps: (1) sed pipe-delimiter injection in sync-env.sh — replace with awk, (2) token bootstrap race — auto-generated token never reaches userConfig, (3) overseerr-mcp .dockerignore missing — credentials leak into image, (4) arcane-mcp AUTH_TOKEN→MCP_BEARER_TOKEN is a breaking change needing migration docs, (5) syslog-mcp PUID 1000 vs Dockerfile UID 10001 conflict" 2>&1

Applied engineering review feedback. Consolidated 11→9 beads (merged same-repo). Applied 5 critical fixes: (1) awk instead of sed in sync-env.sh, (2) fail-if-no-token instead of auto-gen, (3) .dockerignore priority for overseerr-mcp, (4) AUTH_TOKEN→MCP_BEARER_TOKEN migration docs for arcane-mcp, (5) PUID/UID conflict resolution for syslog-mcp. Added per-language memory limits (Python 1024M, Node 512M, Rust 256M) and start-period tuning. Added 2 new beads: guide template fix (wave 1 blocker) and test_live.sh stamping (wave 3)." 2>&1
.dockerignore must include .claude-plugin/, .omc/, .lavra/, .beads/, .cache/ — AI tooling dirs are large and leak into Docker images if not excluded." 2>&1

sed pipe-delimiter injection: using sed -i with | as delimiter and user-controlled values allows values containing | to corrupt the substitution. awk -v key -v val is safe because the value is never interpreted as a regex." 2>&1

Removed token auto-generation from sync-env.sh. Auto-gen creates a token mismatch: server reads the generated token but Claude Code sends the empty userConfig value. Fail-fast with a clear error is better UX than silent 401s." 2>&1
